ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Erika Miyuki Haraguchi appearing via zoom for Marion Woodard (administrator)

Mrs. Haraguchi stated she filed the status report yesterday, that she does not have good cause and that she did not make any of the deadlines. The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Erika Miyuki Haraguchi Pursuant to CCP 177.5 payable within 10 days of the order. Status on close of estate is continued to June 06, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Erika Miyuki Haraguchi via zoom for Marion Woodward (Petitioner).

Mrs. Haraguchi stated she paid the Franchise Tax Board, and that they filed the paperwork to revive the corporation, but the corporation is still suspended. Mrs. Haraguchi also stated that the business has not filed tax returns in over a decade, that in order to close the business they had to go back and pay $800.00 for seven years, and that the check has been cashed, but they are waiting to be unsuspended and then they can close out the business. The Court stated that counsel should have filed a status report before today. Mrs. Haraguchi stated she tried to file it, but it got rejected. The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause to attorney Erika Haraguchi to appear on May 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for not filing the status report on time. Status on close of estate is also continued to May 16. 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erika Haraguchi appeared for and with Marion Woodward (administrator).

Mrs. Haraguchi stated that all of the real property and the personal property has been sold, that they found a corporation when they were going through the decedent's assets, that when they did the research they found that taxes had not been filed for 13-years, that they have submitted everything and that they are waiting for the assignment of a Franchise Tax Board agent. Mrs. Haraguchi also stated that although there is no money in the corporation it is her understanding that they will need to pay taxes, that it will be $800.00 times 13 plus fees, and that she did not appear at the last hearing because she requested a continuance of the December hearing and did not realize it had been assigned a date in January. The court noted that there was no reply to the December 5th examiner's notes. Status on close of estate is continued to April 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed before April 18, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Continued To Feb-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Marion Woodward and her Attorney Erika Haraguchi to appear on February 28, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
